title: METIS Hula Hoops | Durable Multi-Coloured Hula Hoops for Fitness & Fun - Multiple Colours & Sizes
features: MULTIPLE SIZES AND COLOURS – The METIS Hula Hoop is available in multiple sizes including 45cm, 60cm, 76cm and 92cm. Available in packs of 6, these high-quality hula hoops come in an assortment of vibrant colours (may differ to images).
VERSATILE USES – Ideal for obstacle course, fitness activities and kids’ games these premium hula hoops are exceedingly versatile and can be used by children and adults alike.
HIGH QUALITY COMPOSITION – Each evenly weighted 19mm tubular hoop has been manufactured from high density plastic for improved durability against creasing and breakages.
LIGHTWEIGHT COMPOSITION – Due to its lightweight design, the Metis Hula Hoops they can be easily transported and stored when not in use.
CORE DEVELOPMENT – This durable plastic hula hoop is perfect for developing coordination, balance and core strength.
description: Product Description METIS PLAY - INDOOR & OUTDOOR GAMES METIS Play - Outdoor Games LIGHTWEIGHT & DURABLE EQUIPMENT FOR JUNIOR ATHLETES METIS Play offers a comprehensive selection of athletics equipment specifically designed for budding junior athletes. Constructed from lightweight yet incredibly durable materials for safety and longevity, perfect for children to use during school sports days or casual outdoor play. METIS Play equipment actively encourages children of all ages to engage in physical activity, providing opportunities to refine throwing techniques and cultivate essential team-building skills along the way. SET UP AND PLAY ANYWHERE All METIS Play athletics equipment is suitable for indoor & outdoor use a the perfect option for in schools, sports centres or casual outdoor play. PERFECT FOR SPORTS DAYS Choose from shot puts, discuss, foam javelin and more - all available in a variety of vibrant colours for that all important fun outdoors. SUITABLE FOR ALL AGES Constructed from lightweight materials, METIS Play equipment is designed to provide a safe environment and for use by children of all ages. LONG-LASTING SPORTS EQUIPMENT METIS Play equipment is meticulously designed with durability in mind, ensuring it withstands consistent use by children indoors & outdoors with ease.
